tests.message: Call model.train() to set training mode (enables dropout, batch norm updates).
Call optimizer.zero_grad() to clear gradients from the previous step.
Pass inputs through the model to get predictions.
Compute loss using the criterion (loss function).
Call loss.backward() to compute gradients via backpropagation.
Call optimizer.step() to update model weights.
